notes: Reproduced on Docker Linux ARM64 with SkiaSharp 3.119.0-preview.1.2 and 3.119.2. The libSkiaSharp.so for linux-arm64 has FT_Get_BDF_Property and uuid_* as undefined symbols (confirmed via nm -D). At runtime, uuid_generate_random symbol error hits first, crashing the app before FT_Get_BDF_Property can surface. LD_PRELOAD with system libfreetype and libuuid resolves both issues. The x64 build does not have these undefined symbols. Main branch pre-built binaries also do not have the issue — the bug appears fixed on main but not yet released in any NuGet package.

errorMessages.primaryError: symbol lookup error: libSkiaSharp.so: undefined symbol: uuid_generate_random (and FT_Get_BDF_Property confirmed undefined via nm -D)
additionalErrors: nm -D shows FT_Get_BDF_Property as undefined (U) in linux-arm64 libSkiaSharp.so
nm -D also shows uuid_copy, uuid_generate_random, uuid_parse, uuid_unparse as undefined

reproductionSteps.description: Create Docker Linux ARM64 console project with SkiaSharp 3.119.0-preview.1.2 and install dependencies
reproductionSteps.command: docker run --rm --platform linux/arm64 mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:9.0 bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libfontconfig1 uuid-runtime libuuid1 binutils && mkdir -p /tmp/repro && cd /tmp/repro && dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net9.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.119.0-preview.1.2 && dotnet add package SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux --version 3.119.0-preview.1.2 && dotnet restore && dotnet build'

filesCreated.description: Console app that loads SkiaSharp, creates a bitmap, draws a rectangle, and prints success/failure

                 U uuid_unparse

NEEDED libs (readelf -d): libpthread.so.0, libdl.so.2, libm.so.6, libc.so.6, ld-linux-aarch64.so.1 (no libuuid or libfreetype linked)

reproductionSteps.description: Cross-platform: verify x64 libSkiaSharp.so does NOT have undefined FT_Get_BDF_Property — app runs on x64
reproductionSteps.command: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:9.0 bash -c '... nm -D libSkiaSharp.so | grep FT_Get_BDF && dotnet run'
reproductionSteps.output:
x86_64
FT_Get_BDF_Property: not found in x64 symbol table. No uuid undefined symbols on x64.

Arch: X64

reproductionSteps.description: Test main branch pre-built linux-arm64 binary in Docker — no undefined symbols, runs successfully
reproductionSteps.command: docker run --rm --platform linux/arm64 -v /tmp/skiasharp/repro/3229-main-publish:/app mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/runtime:8.0 bash -c 'apt-get install -y -qq libfontconfig1 && nm -D /app/runtimes/linux-arm64/native/libSkiaSharp.so | grep FT_Get_BDF; cd /app && dotnet SkiaSharpSample.dll'
reproductionSteps.output:
FT_Get_BDF_Property: not in symbol table
No uuid undefined symbols
Hello World!
Your platform color type is Bgra8888

versionResults.notes: FT_Get_BDF_Property confirmed undefined in nm -D. Runtime crash with uuid_generate_random. LD_PRELOAD workaround works.
Same FT_Get_BDF_Property undefined symbol. Runtime crash with uuid_parse. Bug still present in latest stable.
Main branch pre-built arm64 binary has no undefined FT_Get_BDF_Property or uuid symbols. Console sample runs successfully. Fix exists on main but is unreleased.
x64 libSkiaSharp.so does not have FT_Get_BDF_Property as undefined. App runs successfully on x64. Bug is ARM64-specific in NuGet builds.

corrections.upstream: Triage stated ftbdf.c is still absent from BUILD.gn on main, implying bug is unfixed
corrections.corrected: While ftbdf.c is still absent from BUILD.gn, the main branch pre-built arm64 binaries no longer have FT_Get_BDF_Property as undefined. The fix may have come through a different mechanism (freetype update, build config change, or linker changes). The pre-built main binaries work correctly on arm64.

actionability.reason: Bug is reproduced on latest stable (3.119.2) but appears fixed on main branch pre-built binaries. The fix has not been released in any NuGet package. Keep open until a release containing the fix is published.

actions.description: Post reproduction results with workaround and fix status
actions.comment:
We've confirmed this issue on Linux ARM64 with SkiaSharp 3.119.0-preview.1.2 and 3.119.2. The `libSkiaSharp.so` for linux-arm64 has `FT_Get_BDF_Property` and several `uuid_*` functions as undefined symbols (`nm -D` confirms). At runtime, this causes a symbol lookup error crash.

The x64 build does not have these undefined symbols. Testing against the main branch pre-built binaries shows the issue is resolved — no undefined symbols and the app runs successfully. A fix appears to be on main but not yet released.

**Workaround** (until a fixed release is available):
```bash
# Find your system freetype and uuid library paths
ldconfig -p | grep -E 'freetype|libuuid'

# Set LD_PRELOAD before running your app
export LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so.1:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so.6
dotnet run
```

workarounds: Set LD_PRELOAD to system libuuid and libfreetype: export LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so.1:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so.6
Install system freetype and uuid packages: apt-get install -y libuuid1 libfreetype6 libfontconfig1

proposedResponse.summary: Confirmed undefined symbol bug on ARM64, fixed on main but unreleased, with LD_PRELOAD workaround
proposedResponse.body:
We've confirmed this issue on Linux ARM64 with SkiaSharp 3.119.0-preview.1.2 and 3.119.2. The `libSkiaSharp.so` for linux-arm64 has `FT_Get_BDF_Property` and several `uuid_*` functions as undefined symbols (`nm -D` confirms). At runtime, this causes a symbol lookup error crash.

The x64 build does not have these undefined symbols. Testing against the main branch pre-built binaries shows the issue is resolved — no undefined symbols and the app runs successfully. A fix appears to be on main but not yet released.

**Workaround** (until a fixed release is available):
```bash
# Find your system freetype and uuid library paths
ldconfig -p | grep -E 'freetype|libuuid'

# Set LD_PRELOAD before running your app
export LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so.1:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so.6
dotnet run
```
